mapper.insert: INSERT INTO practice_sessions (user_id, part, topic, topic_prompt, status, started_at, ended_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{part}, #{topic}, #{topicPrompt}, #{status}, #{startedAt, typeHandler=com.speakingkiller.app.mybatis.typehandler.InstantMillisTypeHandler}, #{endedAt, typeHandler=com.speakingkiller.app.mybatis.typehandler.InstantMillisTypeHandler})
mapper.update: UPDATE practice_sessions SET user_id = #{userId}, part = #{part}, topic = #{topic}, topic_prompt = #{topicPrompt}, status = #{status}, started_at = #{startedAt, typeHandler=com.speakingkiller.app.mybatis.typehandler.InstantMillisTypeHandler}, ended_at = #{endedAt, typeHandler=com.speakingkiller.app.mybatis.typehandler.InstantMillisTypeHandler} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM practice_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId}
